title: Brownfield Access Review Fallback Runbook
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-incident-summary.md` and `./access-review-modernization-observability-summary.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Write the runbook for rolling traffic back from the new brownfield facade to the legacy path if alerts fire. Make the procedure executable, preserve fail-closed and coexistence-safe behavior, include verification and rollback steps, and keep communication and evidence capture explicit.

assertions.name: provides-executable-ordered-steps
assertions.description: Provides an ordered procedure another responder can execute safely

assertions.name: preserves-rollback-and-fail-closed-safety
assertions.description: Includes explicit fallback, fail-closed behavior, and rollback safety

assertions.name: includes-communication-and-escalation
assertions.description: Includes communication cadence, owner, and escalation steps

assertions.name: includes-verification-and-evidence-capture
assertions.description: Includes verification checks and evidence capture rather than only theory
